sources.title: Grade 11 - Term 1: Communism in Russia 1900 to 1940

slides.title: UbuKhomanisi eRashiya, 1900-1940
slides.lead: Indlela umbuso omkhulu wabalimi obubuswa nguTsar owaba ngayo umbuso wokuthoma wobuKhomanisi ephasini - begodu ngeendleko ezinjani ebantwini.

media.alt: Inkwekwezi ebomvu ephakamako ngaphezu kweentsi zeemboni ezidwetjhwe ngendlela ekhethekileko yeentsika zeemphompho zamafemu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 320 180' role='img'><rect width='320' height='180' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect y='128' width='320' height='52' fill='#7a5a3a'/><g fill='#4a4a4a'><rect x='40' y='84' width='22' height='44'/><rect x='78' y='66' width='22' height='62'/><rect x='116' y='96' width='22' height='32'/></g><path d='M232 34 l10 30 h32 l-26 19 10 31 -26 -19 -26 19 10 -31 -26 -19 h32 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Beka umbuzo oyihloko wesahluko: kubayini begodu njani iRashiya yasuka embusweni wobushiqela bakaTsar yaya embusweni wobuKhomanisi weqembu linye eminyakeni engamatjhumi amabili kwaphela? Yembula iingaba ezintathu abafundi abazozihlaziya - ukuwa kobuTsar, ukuthathwa nokuqiniswa kwamandla maBolshevik, kanye netjhugululo kaStalin ye-USSR. Khumbuza abafundi bona balinganise kokubili iinthembiso zomvukela kanye neendleko zawo.

slides.title: IRashiya kaTsar malungana no-1900
slides.lead: Umbuso wobushiqela lapho isigaba esincani sabaphakemeko sasiphethe amandla ngaphezu kwabantu abadududu, ngokunengi abangabalimi.

blocks.text: IRashiya beyibuswa **litshiqela (autocrat)**, uTsar **Nicholas II** wesizukulwana samaRomanov, owazibona anamandla apheleleko avela kuZimu ongaphenduli kiliphi iphalamende. Umphakathi bewungalingani khulu: isigaba esincani sezikhulu kanye nesigaba esiphakathi esikhulako sasingaphezu kweengidi zabantu **abalimi** abatlhagileko kanye **nesigaba sabasebenzi** esitjha semadorobheni.

items: Malungana nama-80% wabantu bebabalimi, abanengi babo basese batlhaga khulu naphezu kokukhululwa kwamakhoboka ngo-1861.
Ukwakhiwa kweemboni okurhabako kwadala amadorobho aminyeneko kanye nobujamo obubudisi bemafemini.
Amaphoyisa asifihlo (Okhrana) kanye nokuvinjelwa kwelwazi kwathulisa abaphikisi bezepolotiki.

media.alt: Ipiramidi ehlukaniswe ngeengaba, isiqongo esifitjhani ngaphezu kwesisekelo esibanzi, itjengisa umphakathi ongalinganiko.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><path d='M110 24 L96 60 H124 Z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M96 60 L82 96 H138 Z' fill='#c8b89a'/><path d='M82 96 L64 140 H156 Z' fill='#7a8b5a'/><line x1='0' y1='60' x2='220' y2='60' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='0' y1='96' x2='220' y2='96' stroke='#f4efe6' stroke-width='2'/></svg>

slides.notes: Gandelela ukutjhwabalala okwenza iRashiya ingazinzi: umbuso wobushiqela ongenandlela esemthethweni yokuveza ukungeneliseki, isihlwele esikhulu sabalimi abatlhagileko abalambele umhlabathi, kanye nesigaba sabasebenzi bemboni esincani kodwana esinelaka. Le mikghwa ngiyo esebenziswa ngabavukeli ngokukhamba kwesikhathi. Yethula igama elithi autocracy (ubushiqela) uliqathanise nombuso womthethosisekelo.

slides.title: Imibono yomvukela
slides.lead: Ukuphikisa uTsar kwathatha eemibonweni ephikisanako, khulukhulu ubuMarx.

blocks.heading: UbuMarx
blocks.text: UKarl Marx watjho bona umlando uqhutjhwa mumzabalazo weengaba begodu bona abasebenzi (abaproletariat) bebazokuwisa isigaba samakhapitali.

blocks.heading: AmaBolshevik
blocks.text: Ihlangothi lamarhamaru elalilawulwa nguLenin elalifuna iqembu elihlelwe ngokuqinileko bona lithathele abasebenzi amandla.

blocks.heading: AmaMenshevik
blocks.text: Ihlangothi lamaMarx elalilinganiselako elalikholwa bona iRashiya kufuze idlule ekhapitalizimi qangi, ngeqembu elibanzi.

slides.notes: Hlathulula bona iRussian Social Democratic Labour Party yahlukana ngo-1903 yaba maBolshevik (alawulwa nguLenin) namaMenshevik. Gcina umahluko ulula kodwana uqondile: bobabili bebabuMarx, kodwana bebangavumelani ngokwakhiwa kweqembu nangokurhaba komvukela. Ukuhlukana lokhu kuqakathekile ngombana ngamaBolshevik agcina athethe amandla ngo-1917.

slides.title: Umvukela we-1905
slides.lead: Ukuhlulwa epini nokubulawa kwabatjhili abanokuthula kwatjhukumisa amandla kaTsar.

blocks.text: Ukuhlulwa okuhlazisako **ePini yeRashiya neJapan (1904-1905)** kwandisa ukungeneliseki. Nge**Sonto Legazi** (22 January 1905) amasotja adubula abatjhili abanokuthula ebebancenga uTsar eSt Petersburg, abulala abanengi. Amagcabho, ukuvukela kwamasotja kanye namakhansele wabasebenzi wokuthoma, ama**soviet**, kwarhatjheka kilo loke elombuso.

items: Bona asinde, uNicholas II wakhupha i-October Manifesto ethembisa iphalamende (iDuma) kanye namalungelo wesakhamuzi.
Kwathi nakubuya ukuthula, wabuyisela emuva iimvumelwano lezi wagcina amandla wamambala.
U-1905 uvamise ukubizwa ngokuthi 'ukuzilolonga' kwemivukela ka-1917.

media.alt: Isihlwele seenrhemo ezincani phambi kwamasango wesigodlo, kunephethselo elibomvu eliphakanyisiweko.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='150' y='40' width='90' height='96' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#8a8a8a'><rect x='158' y='52' width='8' height='84'/><rect x='176' y='52' width='8' height='84'/><rect x='194' y='52' width='8' height='84'/><rect x='212' y='52' width='8' height='84'/></g><g fill='#4a4a4a'><circle cx='30' cy='104' r='7'/><circle cx='52' cy='100' r='7'/><circle cx='74' cy='106' r='7'/><circle cx='96' cy='100' r='7'/><circle cx='118' cy='106' r='7'/></g><rect x='70' y='60' width='4' height='44' fill='#5a3a24'/><rect x='74' y='60' width='30' height='18' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Sebenzisa u-1905 ukutjengisa ipeteni: ubudisi (ipi) kanye nesibangeli (iSonto Legazi) kanye nobudisi bezomnotho kudala isiphithiphithi esikhulu. Gandelela bona uTsar wasinda kwaphela ngokwenza iinthembiso angazange azigcine, okwamlulaza khudlwana. Ama-soviet aqala lapha kokuthoma begodu azoqala godu ngo-1917, ngalokho awagqamise.

slides.title: IPi yePhasi yokuThoma nomthwalo eRashiya
slides.lead: Ipi epheleleko yembula ubuthakathaka bombuso kaTsar begodu yawuphosela ephuzwini lokuphuka.

blocks.text: IRashiya yangena **ePini yePhasi yokuThoma** ngo-1914. Amabutho angahlomiswanga kuhle ahlangabezana nokulimala okukhulu, kukulapho ukutlhayela kokudla namafutha kwabamba amadorobho. UNicholas II wathatha ubukhokheli ephini ngokwakhe, watjhiya urhulumende ezandleni **zeNdlovukazi Alexandra** engathandwako kanye nomeluleki ohlazekileko **uRasputin**.

items: Iingidi zamasotja zabulawa, zalimala namkha zathunjwa.
Ukwenyuka kwamanani nokutlhayela kwadala indlala nemilayini emide yesinkwa ePetrograd.
Ekuthomeni kwaka-1917 ukuthembeka kuTsar bekusele kudilikile phakathi kwabasebenzi, amasotja ngitjho nabaphakemeko.

media.alt: Igrafu yomudwa okhuphukako etjengisa ubudisi obwandako buya ngo-1917.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><line x1='30' y1='20' x2='30' y2='134' stroke='#4a4a4a' stroke-width='2'/><line x1='30' y1='134' x2='214' y2='134' stroke='#4a4a4a' stroke-width='2'/><polyline points='34,120 78,108 122,84 166,52 208,26' fill='none' stroke='#8a1f1f' stroke-width='4'/><text x='120' y='152' font-size='11' fill='#4a4a4a' text-anchor='middle'>1914 to 1917</text></svg>

slides.notes: Beka iPi yePhasi yokuThoma njengembangela eyaphendula imiraro eyayikhona yaba kukudilika okupheleleko. Umbono oyihloko kubafundi be-FET kubangela: ipi ayidalanga imiraro yeRashiya kodwana yayandisa khulu yaphuca uTsar isekelo lakhe elaliseleko. Qaphela ukulahleka kokuthembeka kwamabutho - ngaphandle kwamasotja, umbuso bewungeze wazivikela.

slides.title: Ukuwa kukaTsar
slides.lead: NgoMatjhi 1917 (uFebruwari ngekhalenda elidala leRashiya) amagcabho nokuvukela kwamasotja kwaqothula ubukhosi.

blocks.text: Umtjhagalo wesinkwa namagcabho e**Petrograd** kwakhula kwaba mitjhagalo emikhulu. Nakuthi amasotja ala ukudubula isihlwele afaka isandla naso, umbuso walahlekelwa mulawulo. Nge-**15 March 1917 (2 March, ngekhalenda elidala)** uNicholas II **wabeka phasi isihlalo sobukhosi**, kwaphela ubukhosi bamaRomanov beminyaka engaphezu kwama-300.

items: **URhulumende weSikhatjhana** wabosopolotiki ababelibharale nabalinganiselako wathatha ilawulo.
Ngesikhathi esifanako i**Soviet yePetrograd** yabasebenzi namasotja beyinethonya lamambala.
Ukudibana lokhu kwaziwa ngokuthi **aMandla amaBili** - iziphathimandla ezimbili ezaziqophisana ekubuseni.

media.alt: Isihlombo esiwako siwela phasi endaweni yaso.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 200 160' role='img'><rect width='200' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='78' y='110' width='44' height='30' fill='#c8b89a'/><g transform='rotate(24 130 70)'><path d='M104 78 L112 50 L124 66 L136 44 L148 66 L160 50 L168 78 Z' fill='#e8a13a'/><rect x='104' y='78' width='64' height='10' fill='#c98a1f'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Cacisa ukudideka kwekhalenda ngaphambili: iRashiya beyisebenzisa ikhalenda leJulian, ngalokho umvukela ka'Februwari' wenzeka ngoMatjhi ngekhalenda lethu, umvukela wa'Oktoba' wenzeka ngoSinyikhaba. Gandelela bona uFebruwari bewuyikuvukela okuvela ngokwako, okwabantu, ingasi iqhinga lamaBolshevik. Yethula aMandla amaBili ngokutjhejisisa - kuhlathulula bona kubayini uRhulumende weSikhatjhana bewubuthakathaka begodu wangahlali isikhathi eside.

slides.title: ULenin namaBolshevik
slides.lead: ULenin wabuya ekudingisweni anehlelo elibukhali nelilula elalikhuluma nabantu abadiniweko yipi nabalambileko.

blocks.text: Nakabuya ngo-April 1917, **uVladimir Lenin** wala nasiphi isibopho noRhulumende weSikhatjhana. Ku-**April Theses** yakhe wabawa bona ipi iphele khonokho, umhlabathi unikelwe abalimi, kanye 'nokobana woke amandla akhambe kuma-Soviet'. Njengombana uRhulumende weSikhatjhana bewuragela phambili nokulwa ipi, isekelo lamaBolshevik lakhula.

items: Isiqunto sikaRhulumende weSikhatjhana sokuragela phambili nePi yePhasi yokuThoma besinganeliswa khulu.
ULenin wathembisa lokho abantu abakufuna khulu: ukuthula, umhlabathi nokudla.
AmaBolshevik awina ubunengi kuma-soviet wePetrograd neMoscow ekwindla laka-1917.

slides.notes: Hlathulula bona kubayini amaBolshevik aphumelela lapho uRhulumende weSikhatjhana wehluleka khona: anikela iinqedo ezicacileko nezithandwako zepi, indlala yomhlabathi nokutlhayela kokudla, kukulapho uRhulumende weSikhatjhana bewuragela phambili nokulwa ipi enganawuwina. Isiqubulo esithi 'Ukuthula, uMhlabathi, iSinkwa' sisibonelo esihle sokukhuluma kwezepolotiki - buza abafundi bona kubayini ligama linye ngalinye belimqoka esiqhemeni esithileko.

slides.title: AmaBolshevik athatha amandla
slides.lead: NgoSinyikhaba 1917 (u-Oktoba ngekhalenda elidala) amaBolshevik awisa uRhulumende weSikhatjhana.

blocks.text: Kuhlelwe khulukhulu **nguLeon Trotsky** ngeKomidi yezokuVukela yezeSotja yeSoviet yePetrograd, abasebenzi abahlomileko, amasotja namatjhorho (amaRed Guard) athatha iindawo eziqakathekileko ePetrograd begodu ahlasela **iWinter Palace** nge-**7 November 1917 (25 October, ngekhalenda elidala)**. URhulumende weSikhatjhana wawa ngokuvimbela okuncani.

items: AmaBolshevik akhupha imithetho yokuthula neyomhlabathi msinyana.
Lokhu bekukuthathwa kwamandla okuhleliweko, ingasi ukuvukela okukhulu kwabantu njengoFebruwari.
IRashiya yaba mbuso wokuthoma ephasini obuswa ngegama lobuKhomanisi.

media.alt: Iphethselo elibomvu eliphakanyiswe ngaphezu kwesakhiwo esikhulu sesigodlo ebusuku.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#2c2c3a'/><circle cx='198' cy='34' r='14' fill='#e8e2d0'/><rect x='30' y='72' width='180' height='64' fill='#6b6b5a'/><g fill='#2c2c3a'><rect x='44' y='86' width='12' height='28'/><rect x='72' y='86' width='12' height='28'/><rect x='100' y='86' width='12' height='28'/><rect x='128' y='86' width='12' height='28'/><rect x='156' y='86' width='12' height='28'/><rect x='184' y='86' width='12' height='28'/></g><rect x='118' y='30' width='4' height='44' fill='#c8b89a'/><rect x='122' y='30' width='34' height='20' fill='#8a1f1f'/></svg>

slides.notes: Dweba umahluko oqakathekileko: uFebruwari bekukudilika okubanzi, okuvela ngokwako kobukhosi; u-Oktoba bekukuthathwa kwamandla okuhleliweko, okuqinileko liqembu elincani elinesiyalo. Nikela uTrotsky idumela ngendima yakhe yokuhlela. Qaphela bona ukuthatha amandla ePetrograd bekuyinto yinye - ukubamba amandla enarheni ekulu, ehlukeneko bekuzokubangela ipi yamakhaya enolaka, isahluko esilandelako.

slides.title: IPi yamaKhaya ne-War Communism
slides.lead: AmaBolshevik awina ipi yamakhaya etjhabalalisako kodwana ngeendleko ezikulu ebantwini.

blocks.text: Abaphikisi bamaBolshevik - ama**White (abaMhlophe)**, ubudlelwana obungazinzanga bebusiseli bobukhosi, abambharale namaSoshiyali aphikisanako, asekelwe manarha wangaphandle - balwa namaBolshevik ama**Red (abaBomvu)**. UTrotsky wakha wakhokhela **iRed Army**. Ukuyipha impahla, umbuso wabeka **iWar Communism**, wathumba amabele kubalimi walawula umnotho, kukulapho amaphoyisa asifihlo (**iCheka**) acobelela abaphikisi nge'Red Terror'.

items: UTsar wangaphambili nomndeni wakhe babulawa ngo-1918.
Ipi, indlala nomkhuhlane kwabulala iingidi phakathi kwaka-1918 no-1921.
AmaRed awina ngo-1921, asizwa bubunye, ukulawula iphakathi neentimela, kanye nokuhlukana kwamaWhite.

media.alt: Imicibisholo emibili ephikisanako, ebomvu nezotha, ihlangana phakathi kwesirhelo semephu.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 240 160' role='img'><rect width='240' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='40' width='180' height='80' rx='10' fill='#e6ddc9'/><path d='M40 80 h120 l-16 -14 v9 h-104 z' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M40 80 h104 v9 l16 -14 h-120 z' fill='#8a1f1f' opacity='0'/><path d='M200 80 h-70 l16 -14 v9 h54 z' fill='#6b6b6b'/><path d='M200 80 h-54 v9 l-16 -14 h70 z' fill='#6b6b6b' opacity='0'/></svg>

slides.notes: Phatha isikhathi esinolaka lesi ngokuzibophezela: yiba nqophile) ngobukhulu bokutlhaga ngaphandle kokugxila eendabeni ezingatlhogekiko. Hlathulula bona kubayini amaRed awina - indawo ephakathi, ukulawula iintimela neemboni, ilawulo linye ngaphasi kukaTrotsky, kanye nokuhlukana kwamaWhite. Yethula i-War Communism neCheka, ngombana ilaka labalimi ngokuthunjwa kwamabele lidosela ngqo e-NEP esahlukweni esilandelako.

slides.title: I-NEP nokubelethwa kwe-USSR
slides.lead: ULenin wabuyela emumva emnothweni oxubeneko bona alulame, begodu kwakhiwa ibumbano elitjha.

blocks.text: Ngemva kwendlala nemivukela (kufaka hlangana ukuvukela kwe-**Kronstadt** ka-1921), uLenin wethula **uMthethomgomo oMutjha wezoMnotho (NEP)** ngo-1921. Wavumela ukurhweba kwangasese okuncani wavumela abalimi bathengise amabele aseleko, kukulapho umbuso ugcina ilawulo lemboni ekulu. Ngo-**1922** kwasungulwa ngokusemthethweni i**Union of Soviet Socialist Republics (USSR)**.

items: I-NEP beyisivumelwano esinengqondo sokwakha bunye umnotho odilikileko.
Amanye amaKhomanisi bekangayithandi njengokubuyela emumva ebuSoshiyalini.
ULenin wahlongakala ngoJanabari 1924, angatjhiya obekazomlandela ocacileko.

media.alt: Uphawu lwesando nesikela okuphambanisiweko ngaphakathi kwesiyingi.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 180 160' role='img'><rect width='180' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><circle cx='90' cy='80' r='52' fill='#8a1f1f'/><path d='M64 108 q22 -50 44 -66' stroke='#e8d9a0' stroke-width='9' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><path d='M108 42 q18 12 8 34' stroke='#e8d9a0' stroke-width='9' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/><rect x='60' y='96' width='52' height='9' rx='3' fill='#e8d9a0' transform='rotate(-38 86 100)'/><rect x='96' y='58' width='28' height='12' rx='2' fill='#e8d9a0' transform='rotate(-38 110 64)'/></svg>

slides.notes: Hlathulula i-NEP njengokubuyela emumva okunecebo: uLenin wamukela ubukhapitali obulinganiselweko bona asindise umvukela ngemva kwamatlhuwo we-War Communism. Qaphela impikiswano evulwe lokhu ngaphakathi eqenjini malungana nokobana kufuze kuvunywe kangangani - impikiswano uStalin noTrotsky abazokulwa ngayo ngokukhamba kwesikhathi. Ukuhlongakala kukaLenin ngaphandle komlandeli obekiweko kubeka umzabalazo wamandla esahlukweni esilandelako.

slides.title: Ukuphakama kukaStalin
slides.lead: Umlawuli weqembu othuleko wakhwabanisa abaphikisi bakhe bona abe mkhokheli oyedwa.

blocks.text: **UJoseph Stalin**, njengoNobhala-Jikelele weqembu, walawula ukubekwa kwabantu emisebenzini wakha inethiwaki yeensebenzi ezithembekileko. Ngokudlalisa abaphikisi omunye komunye, wahlula **uLeon Trotsky** owaziwa khudlwana, owagwatjwa eqenjini wagcina adingisiwe wabulawa. Malungana no-1928 uStalin bekamkhokheli ongaphikiswako we-USSR.

items: UStalin waphikelela nge'buSoshiyali eNarheni yinye'; uTrotsky bekathanda umvukela ephasinapheze.
Ukulawula kukaStalin umtjhini weqembu bekusibonelelo sakhe esiqakathekileko.
Ngemva kwalokho wethula ihlelo elinamandla lokutjhugulula umnotho weSoviet.

media.alt: Iimpahla zomdlalo we-chess ezimbili, esinye simile esinye siwisiwe, phezu kwebhodo.
media.data: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 220 160' role='img'><rect width='220' height='160' fill='#f4efe6'/><rect x='30' y='118' width='160' height='16' fill='#c8b89a'/><g fill='#4a4a4a'><rect x='70' y='60' width='16' height='58'/><circle cx='78' cy='56' r='12'/></g><g fill='#8a1f1f'><rect x='120' y='110' width='48' height='14' rx='6'/><circle cx='166' cy='116' r='10'/></g></svg>

slides.notes: Lungisa umbono ophambeneko ovamileko: uStalin wawina ingasi ngombana bekamuntu ohlakaniphe khulu ngethiyori - uTrotsky bekadunywe khudlwana - kodwana ngombana bekalawula umtjhini wokuphatha weqembu nokubekwa kwabantu. Hlathulula 'ubuSoshiyali eNarheni yinye' uqathanise 'nomvukela ohlala njalo' ngokulula. Beka ukutjhuguluka kusuka ezepolotiki kuya ezomnotho: uStalin nje utjhugulula umphakathi weSoviet ngamandla.

slides.title: I-collectivisation ne-industrialisation
slides.lead: UStalin waqhuba ukwakha butjha okurhabako ngamaHlelo weeMinyaka emiHlanu nokulima okuhlanganisiweko okuphoqiweko.

columns.text: Abalimi baphoqwa bona badele umhlabathi wangasese bajoyine amapulazi amakhulu ahlanganisiweko (**iikolkhozy**). Abalimi abanjingileko, ababizwa **bokulaks**, bathathelwa impahla, badingiswa namkha babulawa.

items: Amabele athunjwa bona apha amadorobho begodu athunyelwe ngaphandle.
Ukuvikela nokuphazamiseka kwasiza ukudala indlala etjhabalalisako ngo-1932-1933.

columns.text: **AmaHlelo weeMinyaka emiHlanu** (kusukela ngo-1928) abeka imigomo emikhulu yamalahle, isimbi, ipetroli nemitjhini, akha amadorobho weemboni amatjha aphuma ehlabathini.

items: Ukukhiqiza kweemboni ezisindako kwakhula ngendlela ekarisako.
Abasebenzi bahlangabezana nesiyalo esibudisi, ubujamo obumbi kanye nomsebenzi ophoqiweko.

slides.notes: Sebenzisa ihlelo lamakholomu amabili bona uvumele abafundi baqathanise iingaba ezimbili zomvukela womnotho kaStalin. Yiba nqophileo ngokutjhentjhiselana okuyihloko ekuhlaziyeni kwe-CAPS: i-USSR yakha iimboni ngesiqubu esikarisako, okwasiza ngokukhamba kwesikhathi bona isinde ePini yePhasi yesiBili, kodwana lokhu kwafezwa ngokuphoqa, ukutlhaga okukhulu nendlala. Indlala e-Ukraine namanye amazwe ngo-1932-1933 (i-Holodomor) ihlathululwa ngokulandelako; iphathe ngokutjhejisisa.

slides.title: Indlala, ubutjhijilo nokususwa
slides.lead: Umbuso kaStalin wahlanganisa ukwakha butjha okurhabako nokugandelela okukhulu nokufa.

blocks.text: Indlala yaka-**1932-1933**, embi khulu e-Ukraine (evamise ukubizwa nge-**Holodomor**), yabulala iingidi. Ngesikhathi se-**Great Purge** (1936-1938), uStalin waphendukela eqenjini lakhe, ebuthweni nasemphakathini wakhe: 'amacala wokubukisa' agweba amaBolshevik amadala, begodu inengi elikhulu labulawa namkha lathunyelwa emakampeni womsebenzi ophoqiweko, i-**Gulag**.

items: Ivalo nokuceba kwasetjenziswa ukulawula abantu.
Ukukhonzwa komuntu kwaveza uStalin njengomkhokheli ohlakaniphe koke.
Ngo-1940 i-USSR beyimbuso onamandla wemboni khulu kodwana ogandelela khulu.

media.alt: Isimu yeengara ezingenalitho ngaphasi kwesibhakabhaka esizotha, itjengisa indlala nelahleko.

slides.notes: Lesi sisahluko esizwelako khulu - siphathe ngokwethembeka okuzothileko nehlonipho kwabahlongakeleko, ubalekele iindaba ezimbi khulu. Veza indlala nokususwa ngokuqophileko njengeendleko zomkhuba kaStalin ebantwini. Khuthaza abafundi be-FET bona babambe amaqiniso amabili ndawonye ekuhlaziyeni: inzuzo yamambala yeemboni neyemfundo, kanye nokugandelela okukhulu nokufa. Qaphela bona abomlando baphikisana ngeenomboro nangezinga lehloso ngemva kwendlala.

slides.title: IRashiya ne-USSR, 1900-1940

blocks.alt: Ilayini yesikhathi yeenkambiso eziqakathekileko eRashiya kusukela ngo-1905 kuya emaphethelweni wama-1930s.

events.label: Umvukela we-1905: iSonto Legazi ne-October Manifesto
Umvukela kaFebruwari: uTsar Nicholas II ubeka phasi isihlalo sobukhosi
UStalin uba nesandla; iHlelo lokuthoma leeMinyaka emiHlanu liyathoma

slides.notes: Sebenzisa isahluko lesi ukuhlanganisa ukulandelana kwesikhathi kwaso soke isahluko ngaphambi kwemibuzo yokubuyekeza. Bawa abafundi bona bakhombe iindawo zokutjhentjha begodu bahlanganise iinkambiso ngeengaba ezintathu: ukuwa kobuTsar, ukuthathwa nokuqiniswa kwamandla maBolshevik, kanye netjhugululo kaStalin. Qinisa iphuzu lekhalenda leJulian-ku-Gregorian ngoFebruwari no-Oktoba.

slides.title: Esikufundileko
slides.lead: Eminyakeni engamatjhumi amane iRashiya yasuka embusweni wobushiqela bakaTsar yaya embusweni onamandla wobuKhomanisi - yatjhentjhwa ngeendleko ezikhulu ebantwini.

blocks.text: Ihlelo lakaTsar ladilika ngaphasi komthwalo wokungalingani, ubushiqela nomthwalo weePi yePhasi yokuThoma. AmaBolshevik athatha abamba amandla, begodu ngaphasi kukaStalin i-USSR yakha iimboni ngokurhaba nge-collectivisation namaHlelo weeMinyaka emiHlanu - imisebenzi esithuthunjelwe yindlala, ubutjhijilo nobushiqela.

blocks.question: Hlathulula bona kubayini umbuso kaTsar wadilika ngo-1917. Sebenzisa imbangela zesikhathi eside nomthelela weePi yePhasi yokuThoma.
AmaBolshevik akghona njani ukuthatha nokubamba amandla phakathi kwaka-1917 no-1921?
'UStalin watjhugulula i-USSR, kodwana ngeendleko eziphakeme khulu ebantwini.' Uyavumelana? Sekela ipendulo yakho ngobufakazi.

slides.notes: Phetha ngokubuyela embuzweni oyihloko wesahluko kanye nomongo wetjhugululo eneendleko. Imibuzo emithathu iyakhula ngezinga lokucabanga bona ihlangane nokulindeleko kwe-CAPS FET: ihlathululo yembangela, ukuhlaziya ukuqiniswa kwamandla, kanye nesahlulelo esinjenge-eseyi esifuna umbono osekelwe kuhle. Khuthaza abafundi bona basebenzise ubufakazi obuqondileko begodu balinganise kokubili imisebenzi neendleko.
